sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 137:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 137:1
items.html: When illumination of GAR returns to the Partzuf and expands in Hod, the light of Yesod departed and rose to its root to illumination of GAR in Hod. Then the truncated Vav rose along with it when they are united in one another, and the light of the Dalet descended to Malchut. (Inner Light, Item‎ 46)
